item.description:
🍎 `iData v0.1.1` brings the first polished in-window `VisiData` experience.
- adds a glass-style welcome screen with version, format examples, and common VisiData shortcuts - opens most regular files directly, including odd bioinformatics suffixes such as `.ma` - streams `.gz` / `.bgz` / `.bgzf` files without extracting them to disk - adds Sparkle-based in-app update checks backed by GitHub Releases and `appcast.xml` - packages a drag-to-Applications `.dmg` installer alongside the `.zip` bundle
